title: pedicularis fasciculata subsp. cenisia
intro: Pedicularis fasciculata subsp. cenisia, also known as Cenis Pedicularis, is a subspecies of flowering plant that belongs to the broomrape family. Traditionally, it has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits associated with Pedicularis fasciculata subsp. cenisia include reducing inflammation, improving respiratory issues, and supporting the immune system. Herbal preparations of this plant are typically made by infusing the leaves in hot water or using it as a tincture, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
